overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban environment during golden hour. The player moves from an enclosed industrial street through commercial districts with neon signage, eventually reaching a waterfront promenade beneath a massive overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial urban street beneath elevated infrastructure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath industrial overpasses, passing residential buildings

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive yellow steel girder structure spanning overhead with support beams
multi-story concrete apartment block with balconies and external fire escape
orange and white striped plastic barriers lining the street edge
tall palm tree trunk visible against the building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens beneath a massive industrial overpass structure with yellow steel girders. The camera moves forward along a concrete sidewalk past a multi-story residential apartment building with balconies. Sparse pedestrians walk along the path, and construction barriers line the left side of the street. The lighting is warm golden hour sun mixed with shadows from the overhead structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with neon storefronts and vending areas

events.description: transitioning from industrial residential area to commercial district with illuminated storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking along the commercial sidewalk, passing pedestrians and storefronts with neon signage

notable_agents.action: standing near a vending machine looking at the display

entered.detail: modern commercial structure with large glass windows and ground floor shops
illuminated pink and blue neon signage marking store entrances
row of automated vending machines with glowing displays
bags of garbage and debris accumulated along the building wall

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a commercial district with illuminated storefronts and neon signage. The camera continues walking forward along the concrete sidewalk, passing vending machines and piles of trash bags along the right wall. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions, and the industrial overpass structure recedes to the left. The atmosphere is distinctly cyberpunk with glowing neon accents against the warm sunset light.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban corridor beneath elevated highway overpass

events.description: entering the shadowed area beneath the massive concrete overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking through the corridor approaching the overpass, with pedestrians ahead moving toward the waterfront

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead toward the open waterfront area

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with thick support columns spanning the width of the scene
large illuminated digital advertisement screen mounted on the building facade
thick cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the overhead highway structure

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and enters a semi-covered corridor beneath a massive concrete highway overpass. Digital billboards become visible on the left, and thick bridge support columns dominate the center of the frame. The lighting shifts to a mix of golden hour sun from the far end and deep shadows under the overpass. Pedestrians walk ahead toward the bright opening where the waterfront is visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade beneath overpass with sunset view

events.description: turning toward the waterfront revealing the water body and distant structures against the sunset
multiple vehicles driving past on the road under the overpass, headlights on

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront path under the overpass, observing the sunset over the water and passing traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the road beneath the overpass with headlights illuminated

entered.detail: massive vertical digital billboard displaying 'NiCola' advertisement with insect graphic and 'Share the Love' text
calm body of water reflecting the golden sunset light, visible through the overpass columns
industrial buildings and towers silhouetted against the bright sunset on the horizon
metal safety railing along the edge of the waterfront promenade

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens to a wide waterfront view beneath the overpass, with the camera turning right to reveal a stunning sunset over the water. A massive 'NiCola' digital billboard dominates the left side. Vehicles drive past on the road with headlights on, while the golden sun creates a strong backlight effect through the overpass columns. The scene ends with a view of the water, distant industrial structures, and dry vegetation along the waterfront path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a shadowed industrial street into a vibrant commercial district, eventually opening onto a wide waterfront at sunset. It begins beneath a massive overpass of yellow steel girders, moving past residential balconies and construction barriers under a mix of golden light and deep shadows. As the camera advances, the industrial structures recede to the left and the environment shifts into a cyberpunk commercial zone filled with glowing neon signage, vending machines, and bustling pedestrians. The scene then transitions into a semi-covered corridor dominated by thick concrete bridge columns and digital billboards before emerging from the shadows toward a bright opening. Finally, the camera turns right to reveal a stunning sunset over the water, framed by a massive NiCola billboard and the silhouettes of distant industrial structures.
